steps.title: Use Rivera's finding
steps.content: Rivera found that one barrier is young adults' lack of knowledge about practical details of starting businesses. He also found that good informational resources significantly reduce that problem.

steps.title: Match the proposed remedy
steps.content: A creates social networks, B prompts idea generation, and D offers training at existing businesses. None directly supplies practical startup information, the remedy Rivera identified. The promising approach is giving young adults practical information about starting a business. The answer is C.
